svg.title: Timesheet pilot architecture on Vercel and Supabase
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing a Next.js frontend on Vercel, Supabase backend with Postgres, auth, and edge functions, plus email delivery via Resend.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What devices will users access the timesheet from?')
sendPrompt('What can managers do in the timesheet system?')
sendPrompt('What admin features are needed for the timesheet?')
sendPrompt('How would Resend handle automated timesheet reminders?')
